title: Skrillex – “Duro” (Feat. Young Miko)
author: Chris DeVille
summary:
Last time we checked in with Puerto Rican rapper Young Miko, she was interpolating Lil Wayne and Lil Jon on her single “WASSUP.” That was almost a year ago, and since then Miko has continued her ascent, including an appearance in Bad Bunny’s Super Bowl halftime show. Today she’s shifted into hyperpop mode on “Duro,”…

The post Skrillex – “Duro” (Feat. Young Miko) appeared first on Stereogum.
full_text: Last time we checked in with Puerto Rican rapper Young Miko, she was interpolating Lil Wayne and Lil Jon on her single "WASSUP." That was almost a year ago, and since then Miko has continued her ascent, including an appearance in Bad Bunny's Super Bowl halftime show. Today she's shifted into hyperpop mode on "Duro," a banging new single from Skrillex. The track sets Miko's computerized melodies (and some bars) into frenetic Sonny Moore production that gets a lot of mileage out of laser synths. Listen below.
